facade_description: 360 Spadina Ave presents a street-facing facade within the Kensington Market HCD. The street elevation spans roughly 6.1 metres across 2 storeys and is capped by a flat. The facade reads primarily as stucco in a dark grey/black facade behind large illuminated yellow signage palette, laid in running bond with light grey mortar joints. The facade is organized as a storefront base with 2 upper-window bays, using not visible (concealed behind signage and grilles), and 1 principal entrance. Character-defining facade elements include cornice.
